description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, glossy touchscreen display with a black bezel, showing a grid of colorful app icons and a status bar at the top. The back is matte black with a prominent silver Apple logo centered and a single camera lens with flash in the top left corner. The sides are slim and appear to be made of metal or high-quality plastic, with visible buttons for volume and power. The device is compact and lightweight, designed for handheld use and portability. Its overall appearance is minimalist and premium, typical of recent iPhone models.
description: A sleek, black smartphone with a glossy touchscreen front, matte back with Apple logo, and a single rear camera. The device is slim, compact, and visually modern.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large touchscreen display with app icons, a black bezel, and the home button area at the bottom.
description_view_1: The left edge view reveals the slim profile and the placement of side buttons, with no screen or logo visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays the matte black surface, centered silver Apple logo, 'iPhone' text, and a single camera with flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: The right edge view highlights the thinness of the device and the location of additional side buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, visually prominent against the matte black surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a typical iOS home screen with colorful app icons, a status bar at the top, and a dark, cloudy wallpaper background.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens with flash is located in the top left corner on the back of the device, slightly raised from the surface.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on both the left and right edges: volume buttons and mute switch on the left, power button on the right. A circular home button is located below the screen on the front.
